title: 10k Subs and Talisman 2e Character Tier list
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wg1R2_G_LEc

Celebrating 10,000 subscribers with a comprehensive tier ranking of all Talisman 2nd Edition characters from the base game and expansions (City, Timescape, Dungeon, Adventure).

**Ranking Criteria:**
- Art quality and appeal
- Special abilities
- How much Daniel would want to play them
- Based on rules as written (house rules would change some rankings)

**S-TIER (Best):**
Cyborg, Assassin, Prophetess, Warrior, Martial Artist, Warrior of Chaos, Ninja, Necromancer, Spy

**A-TIER:**
Monk, Wizard, Sprite, Highlander, Dwarf, Woodsman, Halfling, Conjurer, Chainsaw Warrior, Inquisitor, Philosopher, Dark Elf, Knight

**B-TIER:**
Amazon, Space Pirate, Scout, Ranger, Pilgrim, Satyr, Ghoul, Centaur, Pirate, Gladiator, Elf, Witch Doctor, Troll, Swashbuckler, Barbarian, Druid, Sorceress

**C-TIER:**
Gypsy, Leprechaun, Archaeologist, Soldier, Astronaut, Space Marine, Barbarian (Timescape), Zulu, Hobgoblin, Orc, Thief, Astropath

**D-TIER:**
Rogue, Merchant, Samurai, Scientist

**E-TIER (Worst):**
Minstrel, Swordsman, Priest, Saracen

**Channel Update:**
- Working on Dungeon Dive 3 days/week alongside day job
- Solo RPG Friday podcast continuing
- Dungeon synth album "Mists of Mourning" in progress
- Game design project underway

A fun, completely subjective ranking celebrating a game foundational to Daniel's hobby journey.
